caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture, likely focused on systems thinking and learning, as indicated by the website URL "stw.kumu.io/trial-learning." The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is visible in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking. The main content of the video shows a visual map with various interconnected nodes, each representing different concepts such as "model sharing," "model & play," and "moments." These nodes are connected by lines, suggesting relationships or processes between them. In the top right corner, there is an inset video showing three individuals in a formal setting, possibly dramatizing or illustrating a scenario related to the concepts being discussed. The overall layout suggests an interactive and educational format, combining visual aids and live commentary to explain complex ideas.
